creator: shieronymus@gmail.com
text: The mailing list webpage (http://docs.freebsd.org/mail) needs a link to the 2008 archives page, now that they are being created, located at: http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/archive/2008 Fix: Add the following line to the http://docs.freebsd.org/mail code (below the line for 2007): 2008-- How-To-Repeat: Go to: http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/
